---
title: "Privacy policy"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, results = "asis")
```

```{r}
privacy_path <- file.path(rprojroot::find_root("DESCRIPTION"), "PRIVACY.md")
lines <- readLines(privacy_path, warn = FALSE)
if (length(lines) > 0 && grepl("^#\\s", lines[1])) {
  lines <- lines[-1]
}
cat(lines, sep = "\n")
```
